candidate_scan.conclusion: no aperiodic automatic candidate; the only positive-integral periodic Phi values in the sweep are the trivial cycle transcripts 1 and 2

engine_validation_orbits.statement: Phi(transcript of n) mod 2^64 == n mod 2^64

engine_validation_trivial_cycles.note: (110)^omega is supercritical periodic: Phi = -5, correctly outside Z_{>0} (cycle equation 2^3 < 3^2)

gap_example_sigma_11_10.aperiodicity: PROVED in memo by period divisibility descent
gap_example_sigma_11_10.certified: if Phi(u) in Z_{>0} then Phi(u) >= 2^507

block_oscillator.definition: a(n)=1 iff bitlength(n) odd; 2-automatic, natural density does not exist

supercritical_oscillator.definition: q(n)=1 iff n even or bitlength(n) odd; 2-automatic, natural density does not exist
supercritical_oscillator.status: SURVIVES every density wall: s_L/L >= 2/3 - o(1) uniformly, 2/3 > alpha (witness 3^2 > 2^3)
